channel.title: Anthropos Automation
channel.description: Website redesign + lead automation for solo operators and small teams

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
You're excellent at your work. The internet just doesn't know it yet.

Somewhere tonight, someone needed exactly what you do. They searched. They found someone else. We rebuild your website and wire it to automated follow-up — so leads flow from website → email → follow-up → sale, 24/7. Live in 4 weeks.

30–100% more leads
30–50% better conversion
10–20 h saved weekly
€2k–20k more monthly revenue

Get Free Website Audit Find my story

item.title: What We Do
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
We don't sell software. We give you back your evenings.

Three quiet layers, connected once, working forever.

  • Website Layer — a website that earns trust in five seconds: credentials, proof, one gentle invitation.
  • Automation Layer — follow-up that never forgets: every inquiry greeted in sixty seconds, every hesitation met with a kind reminder.
  • Lead Tracking & Reporting — knowing, finally, what works. No more budget thrown into the dark.

Who we serve: solo operators and small teams, €50k–€500k revenue.
Who we don't: enterprise, large regulated practices, custom needs. We never touch HIPAA or patient-data systems.

item.title: Website Layer
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Modern, mobile-friendly, trust-building, lead-capturing — your credentials where eyes land, your happy clients speaking for you.

item.title: Automation Layer
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Sequences that capture and nurture leads 24/7: inquiry confirmations, gentle reminders, seasonal campaigns, win-backs, upsells.

item.title: Lead Tracking & Reporting
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Where did they come from? What made them call? Know which marketing money works — and stop wasting the rest.

item.title: How It Works
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Live in 4 weeks

  1. Week 1 — Audit & blueprint. We audit your site & lead flow, pick your profession template, gather credentials and proof.
  2. Week 2 — Website build. Pages, forms, social proof, Google Business Profile, mobile & speed.
  3. Week 3 — Automation wiring. Your profession's sequences installed and connected to every form.
  4. Week 4 — Connect, test, live. Tracking in place, sequences tested end-to-end, launch.

item.title: Results
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Case studies coming as clients go live — each one with before/after numbers: leads, conversion, hours saved.

item.title: Free Website Audit
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
What is your website quietly losing?

A free 12-point look at your visibility, trust signals and follow-up gaps — with what each leak costs monthly. Delivered in 48 hours. No call required.

[Insert your form here — it feeds the Lead Inquiry sequence.]

item.title: Regulated Professionals
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Websites & lead automation for regulated professionals. Find your profession:

  • Lawyers
  • Financial Advisors
  • Tax Consultants & Accountants

Websites & lead automation for medical professionals. Find your profession:

  • Doctors
  • Dentists
  • Therapists & Psychologists

Websites & lead automation for e-commerce & retail. Find your profession:

  • Shopify Store Owners
  • Amazon / eBay Multi-Channel Sellers

item.title: Service-Based Professionals
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Websites & lead automation for service-based professionals. Find your profession:

  • Home Services
  • Personal Trainers & Fitness Coaches
  • Business & Marketing Consultants

item.title: Freelancers & Micro-Agencies
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Websites & lead automation for freelancers & micro-agencies. Find your profession:

  • Freelance Designers & Developers
  • Small Marketing Agencies (1–3)

item.title: Creators & Coaches
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Websites & lead automation for creators & coaches. Find your profession:

  • Course Creators & Online Coaches
  • Newsletter Writers

item.title: B2B Service Providers
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Websites & lead automation for b2b service providers. Find your profession:

  • B2B SaaS Implementation Specialists

item.title: Lawyers
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Regulated Professionals

Websites & lead automation for Lawyers

Who this is for: Solo practitioners & small firms (1–5 lawyers) · €50k–€500k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

Outdated website (2010-era, not mobile-friendly)− Lose 30–50% of potential clients who searched online
No lead generation — referrals only− €5k–20k/month lost during slow months
Manual follow-up chaos− Inquiries convert at 20–30% instead of 40–60%
No social proof online− 20–30% worse conversion
Can't track where inquiries come from− Wasted marketing budget

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Modern, fast, mobile-friendly law-firm website
  • Practice-area pages
  • Attorney bio pages
  • Case results & testimonials
  • Contact + case evaluation form
  • Google Business Profile optimized

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Lead Inquiry Sequence — confirm, credentials, testimonials, consultation offer
  2. Abandoned Consultation — 3 gentle reminders
  3. Post-Consultation — summary + retainer
  4. Blog Reader Nurture
  5. Win-Back for 6-month-old inquiries

What changes

✓ +50% conversions from a professional first impression✓ +40% conversion via automatic follow-up✓ Leads 24/7 — no more feast/famine✓ Know where every lead comes from

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Financial Advisors
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Regulated Professionals

Websites & lead automation for Financial Advisors

Who this is for: Independent advisors, solo or 2–3 person practice · €100k–€500k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

Low-quality inbound leads− 10–20 hours/week wasted on unqualified prospects
Website doesn't explain philosophy or fees− 30–40% of prospects go to a competitor
Long sales cycle, no automation− 50% of prospects lost to bad follow-up
No testimonials or case examples− 25–35% worse conversion
Same message to every prospect− 40% of prospects never respond

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Wealth-advisor marketing website
  • Credentials page (CFP, CFA, FPA)
  • Specializations & investment philosophy
  • Transparent fee structure
  • Testimonials
  • Consultation form

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Lead Inquiry — credentials, philosophy, testimonial, consultation offer
  2. Abandoned Consultation reminder
  3. Post-Consultation — summary + proposal
  4. Content Segmentation by interest
  5. Win-Back — “market conditions have changed”

What changes

✓ +50% lead quality✓ +35% conversion from a clear website✓ +40% close rate via follow-up✓ +45% engagement via segmentation

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Tax Consultants & Accountants
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Regulated Professionals

Websites & lead automation for Tax Consultants & Accountants

Who this is for: Solo CPAs & small firms (1–3 people) · €50k–€300k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

Seasonal feast/famine (Jan–Mar busy, rest slow)− Income drops 50% off-season
No lead generation system− €5k–15k/month lost in slow season
Website shows price, not savings− 40% of prospects go to a competitor
No automated follow-up− 50% of inquiries never convert
Messaging outdated year-round− Missed seasonal campaigns

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Tax/accounting firm website
  • Services pages (tax prep, business tax, bookkeeping, payroll)
  • Credentials & results page
  • FAQ
  • Consultation form
  • Tax-strategy blog

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Lead Inquiry — savings email + testimonial
  2. Abandoned Consultation + “common tax mistakes” article
  3. Post-Consultation — optimization proposal
  4. Seasonal Campaign (Jan 1 auto-email)
  5. Blog Nurture
  6. Business-type segmentation

What changes

✓ +30% off-season revenue✓ +50% lead flow✓ +40% conversion by showing value✓ 10–15 new clients in slow season

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Doctors
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Medical Professionals

Websites & lead automation for Doctors

Who this is for: Solo & small practices (1–3 doctors) · €100k–€500k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

Half-empty waiting room− €10k–30k/month in lost revenue
Outdated or missing website− 40–50% of potential new patients lost
Invisible for “[specialty] near me”− €15k–40k/month in lost new patients
No reviews or testimonials online− 30% worse inquiry-to-appointment
Manual reminders; 15–20% no-shows− €3k–5k/month + staff hours

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Modern medical practice website (mobile-first)
  • Doctor bios & services
  • Testimonials & reviews
  • Hours, location, parking
  • New-patient inquiry form
  • Google Business Profile

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. New Patient Inquiry — confirm, credentials, testimonials, how to book
  2. Abandoned Inquiry reminder (5 days)
  3. Blog Reader nurture
  4. Post-visit Review Request
  5. Win-Back — checkup reminder
Boundary: Marketing website + new-patient lead generation ONLY. No patient portal, booking, intake, records, or HIPAA systems — patients book through YOUR system.

What changes

✓ +100% search visibility✓ +50% inquiry-to-appointment✓ More 5-star reviews✓ +20–40% new patients

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Dentists
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Medical Professionals

Websites & lead automation for Dentists

Who this is for: Solo & small dental practices (1–3 dentists) · €100k–€500k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

Inconsistent new patients− €10k–25k/month in lost revenue
Website doesn't showcase transformations− 40% of inquiries don't convert
Invisible for “dentist near me”− €15k–30k/month lost
No before/after gallery− Missing 20–30% of cosmetic revenue
Scattered, low review scores− 25–35% fewer inquiries
Manual reminders; no-shows− €2k–4k/month

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Modern dental website
  • Dentist bios & services
  • Before/after gallery
  • Testimonials, insurance info
  • New-patient inquiry form
  • Google Business Profile

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. New Patient Inquiry — confirm, credentials, before/afters
  2. Abandoned Inquiry (5 days)
  3. Cosmetic Interest sequence
  4. Blog Reader nurture
  5. Review Request
  6. Win-Back checkup reminder
Boundary: Marketing website + new-patient lead generation ONLY. Appointment booking, intake, records and patient portals stay in YOUR system.

What changes

✓ +100% visibility✓ +45% inquiry-to-booking✓ +0.5–1.0 star rating✓ +25–40% new patients

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Therapists & Psychologists
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Medical Professionals

Websites & lead automation for Therapists & Psychologists

Who this is for: Solo & small practices (1–3 therapists) · €50k–€300k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

No online presence− €5k–15k/month in lost revenue
Missing/unprofessional website− 40–50% of potential clients lost
Invisible for “therapist near me anxiety”− €10k–20k/month lost
No testimonials (confidentiality)− 25–35% worse conversion
Clients fear exposure− 30–40% never inquire
Manual follow-up− 50% of inquiries never convert

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Therapist marketing website
  • Bios: credentials, licenses, approach
  • Services & philosophy
  • Anonymous testimonials
  • Confidentiality & privacy statement
  • New-client inquiry form

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. New Client Inquiry — confirm, credentials, how to book securely
  2. Abandoned Inquiry — “therapy is a brave step”
  3. Anxiety-interest nurture
  4. Couples-interest nurture
  5. Content nurture
  6. Win-Back offer
Boundary: Marketing website + new-client lead generation ONLY. No client portal, intake forms, therapy notes, or patient data — scheduling stays in YOUR secure system.

What changes

✓ Visible for high-volume mental-health searches✓ +20% inquiries from concerned clients✓ +40% conversion✓ +30–50% new clients

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Shopify Store Owners
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / E-Commerce & Retail

Websites & lead automation for Shopify Store Owners

Who this is for: Solo owners & small teams (1–2 people) · €50k–€300k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

Checkout conversion 1–2%− €5k–15k/month in lost revenue
70–80% cart abandonment− €3k–10k/month in lost sales
No follow-up after purchase− 40% lower repeat rate
No email list− 50% higher acquisition costs
One-time buyers− €500–2k per new customer
5+ second load time− 50% of mobile visitors bounce

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Speed optimization (under 3 seconds)
  • Mobile optimization
  • Product-page optimization
  • Checkout optimization
  • Email capture & review forms
  • Google Business Profile

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Welcome Sequence (3 emails / 7 days)
  2. Abandoned Cart Recovery (6h, 24h, 48h)
  3. Post-Purchase — confirmation, review request, upsell
  4. Email List Growth (“10% off”)
  5. Re-engagement at 60 days
  6. Upsell / Cross-Sell

What changes

✓ €2k–5k/month recovered from carts✓ +25–40% repeat purchases✓ 1,000–5,000 subscribers/month✓ +50–100% customer lifetime value

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Amazon / eBay Multi-Channel Sellers
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / E-Commerce & Retail

Websites & lead automation for Amazon / eBay Multi-Channel Sellers

Who this is for: Sellers on 2–4 platforms, 1–2 people · €100k–€500k across channels

What hurts — and what it costs you

Fragmented customer messages− €500–2k/month in service failures
Inventory sync nightmare — overselling− €1k–5k/month in chargebacks
Unknown channel profitability− €2k–5k/month wasted
No cross-channel marketing− 40% lower repeat revenue
Manual pricing per platform− €500–1k/month in errors
No customer segmentation− 30% lower engagement

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Unified Shopify storefront
  • Organized, synced catalog
  • Trust signals
  • Lead magnet for email list
  • Mobile optimization

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Unified Customer Inbox (Amazon, eBay, Shopify, WhatsApp)
  2. Auto-response templates
  3. Channel-specific sequences
  4. Price-drop & restock notifications
  5. Cross-channel promotion
  6. VIP segmentation
  7. Inventory sync alerts + weekly profitability report

What changes

✓ -80% response time✓ Overselling eliminated✓ Clear channel profitability✓ +15–25% cross-channel revenue

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Home Services
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Service-Based Professionals

Websites & lead automation for Home Services

Who this is for: Electricians, plumbers, HVAC, carpenters, cleaners · 1–3 people · €100k–€400k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

Unpredictable lead flow− €3k–10k/month in lost revenue
Manual scheduling− €500–2k/month in no-shows
Can't answer while on a job− €1k–3k/month in lost jobs
Invisible for “plumber near me”− €5k–15k/month lost
No reviews or job photos− 30% worse conversion
Unknown job profitability− 20% lower margins

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Service business website + area map
  • Before/after gallery
  • Testimonials & licenses
  • Service descriptions + emergency contact
  • Booking form
  • Google Business Profile

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Lead Inquiry — confirm, testimonials, quick quote
  2. Abandoned Booking reminder
  3. Appointment Confirmation + tech info
  4. Job Completion — invoice + review + referral
  5. Re-engagement at 90 days
  6. Referral — €50 off
  7. Weekly job profitability report

What changes

✓ +30–60% new job inquiries✓ -70% no-shows✓ +20–40% quote-to-booking✓ +25–50% referrals

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Personal Trainers & Fitness Coaches
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Service-Based Professionals

Websites & lead automation for Personal Trainers & Fitness Coaches

Who this is for: Solo trainers & small studios (1–3 trainers) · €50k–€300k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

Word-of-mouth only− €2k–8k/month in lost revenue
Class capacity 10, attendance 4− €1k–3k/month wasted
Clients quit after ~3 months− 50% higher acquisition costs
Manual reminders− €500–1k/month in no-shows
“I have Instagram” — no real website− €3k–10k/month lost
Transformations invisible− 25% worse conversion

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Trainer/studio website
  • Bio with certifications
  • Services (1-on-1, group, online, nutrition)
  • Transformations gallery
  • Class schedule & pricing
  • Inquiry + free-consultation form

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Lead Inquiry — credentials, testimonials, free consultation
  2. Consultation reminder
  3. New Client Welcome + assessment
  4. Class Reminder (24h)
  5. Post-Class Follow-Up
  6. Churn Prevention (30 days)
  7. Referral — 1 month free

What changes

✓ +40–70% new clients✓ +30–50% attendance✓ +25–40% retention✓ -60% no-shows

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Business & Marketing Consultants
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Service-Based Professionals

Websites & lead automation for Business & Marketing Consultants

Who this is for: Solo consultants & small firms (1–2 people) · €50k–€300k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

3–6 month sales cycle− €2k–5k/month in delayed payments
Feast/famine inquiries− €3k–10k/month lost
Outdated site, low credibility− 40% worse conversion
No case studies visible− 30% lower conversion
Proposals forgotten− 50% of proposals dropped
Can't prove ROI− 20–30% lower fees

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Consultant marketing website
  • Bio & services
  • 2–3 ROI case studies
  • Results page & testimonials
  • Thought-leadership blog
  • Inquiry + proposal forms

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Lead Inquiry — credentials + 2 case studies
  2. Abandoned Consultation + 3rd case study
  3. Post-Consultation — notes + strategy
  4. Proposal Follow-Up (day 5)
  5. Blog Nurture
  6. Win-Back
  7. Client Reference request

What changes

✓ +40–60% leads✓ -20–30% sales cycle✓ +30–50% proposal close✓ +15–25% project size

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Freelance Designers & Developers
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Freelancers & Micro-Agencies

Websites & lead automation for Freelance Designers & Developers

Who this is for: Freelance graphic/UX/web designers & developers · €30k–€150k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

Referral-dependent months− €2k–8k/month lost
Outdated portfolio− 40–50% worse conversion
70% tire-kicker inquiries− €1k–3k/month wasted
Projects without stories/results− 25–30% lower fees
Proposal follow-up forgotten− 50% of proposals lost
Design seen as cost, not investment− 20% lower fees

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Portfolio website (best 10–15 projects)
  • 2–3 detailed case studies
  • Services & about pages
  • Testimonials
  • Authority blog
  • Pre-qualifying inquiry form

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Lead Inquiry — portfolio + cases + discovery call
  2. Abandoned Discovery reminder
  3. Post-Discovery — scope + pricing
  4. Proposal Follow-Up (day 5)
  5. Past-Client Re-engagement
  6. Testimonial Request
  7. Blog Nurture

What changes

✓ +50–80% inquiries✓ +40% lead quality✓ +35–50% proposal close✓ -50% admin time

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Small Marketing Agencies (1–3)
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Freelancers & Micro-Agencies

Websites & lead automation for Small Marketing Agencies (1–3)

Who this is for: 1–3 person agencies · social, SEO, email, content, ads · €50k–€300k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

100 agencies, same services− 30–40% lost to price competition
3–6 month sales cycle− €3k–10k/month delayed
Inconsistent inbound− €2k–8k/month lost
“About us” site, not outcomes− 40% worse conversion
Work shown, results not− 25–30% lower contracts
60% of calls unqualified− €1k–3k/month wasted

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Outcome-focused agency website
  • Ideal-client profiles
  • Metric case studies
  • Results page & testimonials
  • Pricing transparency
  • Strategy-call form

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Lead Inquiry — 2 case studies + strategy call
  2. Abandoned Call + 3rd case study
  3. Post-Call — notes + pricing
  4. Proposal Follow-Up
  5. Ideal-Client Nurture
  6. Blog Nurture
  7. Past-Lead Re-engagement

What changes

✓ +60–100% leads✓ +50% lead quality✓ +40–60% close rate✓ +30–50% contract size

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Course Creators & Online Coaches
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Creators & Coaches

Websites & lead automation for Course Creators & Online Coaches

Who this is for: Course creators, coaches, membership providers · €2k–€10k/month

What hurts — and what it costs you

Launches don't fill− €1k–5k/month per course
1–2% landing conversion− €2k–10k/month in lost sales
Students quit at 40%− 60% of lifetime value lost
No upsell to Course B− €1k–3k/month lost
Low engagement− 50% of referral revenue lost
No proof of results− 30–40% worse conversion

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Outcome-focused sales landing page
  • Course preview page
  • Credibility page
  • Student results & testimonials
  • FAQ & pricing pages
  • Lead-magnet landing page

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Lead Magnet delivery + 5-email welcome
  2. Welcome Sequence with objections & testimonials
  3. Student Progression emails
  4. Lagging Student encouragement
  5. Completed-Course upsell
  6. Churn Prevention (30 days)
  7. Feedback + Referral

What changes

✓ +50–150% landing conversion✓ +25–40% completion✓ +30–60% upsell revenue✓ +100–200% student lifetime value

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Newsletter Writers
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / Creators & Coaches

Websites & lead automation for Newsletter Writers

Who this is for: Substack/Ghost/own-platform writers · €500–€5k/month in paid subs

What hurts — and what it costs you

~50 new subscribers/month− €500–2k/month in lost potential
2–3% free-to-paid− €1k–3k/month lost
30% open rate− Wasted content effort
No monetization strategy− €2k–5k/month lost
Buried in the inbox− 40% of potential revenue lost
One email for every reader− 30–40% lower conversion

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Newsletter landing page
  • Best-3-issues sample page
  • Credibility page
  • Reader wins & testimonials
  • Pricing tiers
  • Searchable SEO archive

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Welcome Sequence (3 emails)
  2. Interest segmentation by opens
  3. Interest-based nurture
  4. Paid Upgrade pitch (30 days)
  5. Churn Prevention (60 days)
  6. Upsell (premium, courses, affiliates)
  7. Referral + content repurposing

What changes

✓ +50–100% subscriber growth✓ +100–300% free-to-paid✓ +30–50% engagement✓ +200–400% total revenue

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: B2B SaaS Implementation Specialists
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Who we help / B2B Service Providers

Websites & lead automation for B2B SaaS Implementation Specialists

Who this is for: Onboarding consultants & training providers (Salesforce, HubSpot, Shopify, Zapier…) · €50k–€300k/yr

What hurts — and what it costs you

Referral-dependent projects− €2k–8k/month lost
3–6 month B2B cycle− €3k–10k/month delayed
Compared to cheap freelancers− 20–30% lower margins
“I implement Salesforce” — so do 1,000 others− 30% lower fees
No implementation case studies− 25% worse conversion
Proposals forgotten− €2k–5k/month in lost projects

What we deliver in 4 weeks

Website Layer

  • Consultant marketing website
  • Expertise page (tools, implementations, years)
  • Case studies with timelines & impact
  • Certifications & partnerships
  • Services & testimonials
  • Best-practices blog

Automation Layer — your sequences

  1. Lead Inquiry — cases + roadmap + strategy call
  2. Abandoned Call + extra case study
  3. Post-Call — timeline + pricing
  4. Proposal Follow-Up (day 5)
  5. Implementation Progress updates
  6. Post-Implementation — testimonial ask
  7. Upsell + Past-Client Re-engagement

What changes

✓ +50–80% inquiries✓ -20–30% sales cycle✓ +25–40% project fees✓ +40–60% referrals

Get Free Website Audit

item.title: Stories
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Set this page as your Posts page (Settings → Reading). Every story is a mirror — find yours.

item.title: Guide Library
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Four series, twenty guides per profession

  • Series A — Get Found: local search, Google Business Profile, what your clients type, attribution.
  • Series B — Earn Trust: the 5-second test, credential pages, proof, forms that feel safe.
  • Series C — Never Lose a Lead: the 60-second reply, sequences, reminders, win-backs.
  • Series D — Grow Calmly: repeat business, seasonal campaigns, segmentation, lead reports.

16 professions × 20 guides = 320 interlinked guides. Every guide links: next in series · profession hub · same guide in sibling professions · back to its story.

item.title: “The referrals always came. Until the month they didn't.”
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A solo family lawyer, booked for years by word of mouth alone. Then one quiet month became three, and she realised she had no other door for clients to walk through.

The leak: no lead system + slow follow-up. Typical cost: €5k–20k per month in slow-season revenue.

Does this sound like you?

Start with the guides that close this exact leak, or see everything we build for Lawyers.

Get the free 12-point audit
item.excerpt:encoded: A solo family lawyer, booked for years by word of mouth alone. Then one quiet month became three, and she realised she had no other door for clients to walk through.

item.title: “Patients say I changed their lives. Strangers can't find my door.”
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A dermatologist with a half-empty waiting room — excellent in the exam room, invisible in the search results where new patients actually decide.

The leak: low local visibility + no reviews. Typical cost: €15k–40k per month in lost new patients.

Does this sound like you?

Start with the guides that close this exact leak, or see everything we build for Doctors.

Get the free 12-point audit
item.excerpt:encoded: A dermatologist with a half-empty waiting room — excellent in the exam room, invisible in the search results where new patients actually decide.

item.title: “Eight in ten carts just… leave. I never get to say wait.”
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A two-person store with good traffic and a 1–2% checkout rate. The buyers were there. The follow-up wasn't.

The leak: cart abandonment + no email list. Typical cost: €3k–10k per month in lost sales.

Does this sound like you?

Start with the guides that close this exact leak, or see everything we build for Shopify.

Get the free 12-point audit
item.excerpt:encoded: A two-person store with good traffic and a 1–2% checkout rate. The buyers were there. The follow-up wasn't.

item.title: “I'm under a sink at 2pm. Every missed call is someone else's job.”
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A solo plumber, hands full, phone ringing. Booked weeks followed by empty ones — and no way to answer while working.

The leak: missed inquiries + manual scheduling. Typical cost: €3k–10k per month plus no-shows.

Does this sound like you?

Start with the guides that close this exact leak, or see everything we build for Home Services.

Get the free 12-point audit
item.excerpt:encoded: A solo plumber, hands full, phone ringing. Booked weeks followed by empty ones — and no way to answer while working.

item.title: “I became a freelancer to make things. Now I mostly chase them.”
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A designer whose portfolio undersold her, whose inbox filled with tire-kickers, and whose best proposals died of silence — hers, not theirs.

The leak: no pre-qualification + forgotten follow-up. Typical cost: 50% of proposals lost.

Does this sound like you?

Start with the guides that close this exact leak, or see everything we build for Designers.

Get the free 12-point audit
item.excerpt:encoded: A designer whose portfolio undersold her, whose inbox filled with tire-kickers, and whose best proposals died of silence — hers, not theirs.

item.title: “They were so excited in week one. By lesson four, silence.”
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A course creator with 1,000 monthly visitors, twenty buyers, and students who vanish at 40% — taking reviews, referrals and upsells with them.

The leak: low landing conversion + student churn. Typical cost: 60% of student lifetime value.

Does this sound like you?

Start with the guides that close this exact leak, or see everything we build for Course Creators.

Get the free 12-point audit
item.excerpt:encoded: A course creator with 1,000 monthly visitors, twenty buyers, and students who vanish at 40% — taking reviews, referrals and upsells with them.

item.title: “Everyone says the proposal looks great. Then nobody signs.”
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A Salesforce implementation specialist — one of a thousand, by his own description — losing six-month deals to silence and price comparisons.

The leak: no differentiation + forgotten proposals. Typical cost: €2k–5k per month in lost projects.

Does this sound like you?

Start with the guides that close this exact leak, or see everything we build for B2B Implementation.

Get the free 12-point audit
item.excerpt:encoded: A Salesforce implementation specialist — one of a thousand, by his own description — losing six-month deals to silence and price comparisons.

item.title: “January pays for July. I hold my breath the rest of the year.”
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A solo tax consultant whose income drops by half after March — while his contact list, full of past clients, sits silent for nine months.

The leak: seasonal silence + no campaigns. Typical cost: 50% income drop off-season.

Does this sound like you?

Start with the guides that close this exact leak, or see everything we build for Tax Consultants.

Get the free 12-point audit
item.excerpt:encoded: A solo tax consultant whose income drops by half after March — while his contact list, full of past clients, sits silent for nine months.

item.title: “Taking the first step is hard. My website made it harder.”
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
A therapist whose prospective clients feared exposure more than they feared asking for help — and whose site said nothing to calm them.

The leak: trust & confidentiality unaddressed. Typical cost: 30–40% of qualified prospects never inquire.

Does this sound like you?

Start with the guides that close this exact leak, or see everything we build for Therapists.

Get the free 12-point audit
item.excerpt:encoded: A therapist whose prospective clients feared exposure more than they feared asking for help — and whose site said nothing to calm them.
